title: What I Want You to Know
original_title: What I Want You to Know
overview: What I Want You To Know is a gripping, intimate documentary film about the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan. With searing candor, veterans share personal stories from their deployments and explore the epic tragedy of their wars.  A courageous and unblinking look at the cost and consequences of war, and the moral tragedy of sending America’s young men and women to fight wars their country has no need to fight.
